title: New Groundnut Released in Malawi
abstract: About 18% of Malawi's groundnut area is covered with 1CRISAT/DARTS developed improved varieties. With the recent releases (two in 2000 and one in 2001), and available funds from the ICRISAT/USAID Project for seed multiplication, the area under improved varieties will further increase. About US$ 0.35 million may be generated for groundnut seed production during 2001 through the revolving fund.
